steps.t: Egwylf has decided that the time has come to report the result of her errand seeking the Blood Eye cultists to Erkenbrand.
Bingo is outside the great wall of the fortress at Helm's Deep.
Bingo wants to journey to the village of Marton, north-east of Helm's Deep in the Westfold, in order to look for some food to quiet his grumbling stom…
Bingo has been devastated by the evidence of the destruction of Marton, and wants you to search the ruined town for any survivors that might be trappe…
Bingo is on the road that runs through the ruined town of Marton, in the Westfold.
Bingo found a woman wandering among the ruins of Marton, in the Westfold. He asked you to tell her that you would bring her to safety in the town of G…
Bingo is in the centre of the town of Grimslade, in the Westfold.
Bingo wants to meet you inside the Grimslade Mead Hall, located atop the hill in the centre of Grimslade.
